betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Steam Turbine§f

§aConvert steam into electrical power — the backbone of any reactor setup!§f

The §bSteam Turbine§f is a single-block generator that produces HE from steam. It has a §e1 MHE§f internal power buffer, a §e64,000 mB§f input buffer, and a §e128,000 mB§f output buffer.

§6Crafting§f:
§b• 2×§f Steel Ingot
§b• 2×§f Copper Coil
§b• 2×§f Polymer Bar
§b• 1×§f Titanium Steam Turbine

§6Usage§f:
§b• Set the Fluid ID§f to the steam type your reactor produces (normal / dense / super dense)
§b• Connect steam pipe§f from your reactor or boiler
§b• The turbine decompresses steam§f one density level and produces power
§b• Output Low-Pressure Steam§f must be condensed back to water

§6Density Stages§f: Super Dense → Dense → Steam → Low-Pressure Steam

§eTip§f: The single-block turbine is perfectly adequate for a §bZIRNOX§f setup. For larger reactors like the PWR or RBMK, upgrade to the §bIndustrial Steam Turbine§f for higher throughput and 100% efficiency!
